description: ROSACluster is the Schema for the ROSAClusters API. ROSACluster is the infrastructure provider-specific resource for ROSA HCP clusters. Its spec is intentionally minimal as configuration is managed via ROSAControlPlane.

apiVersion.description: APIVersion defines the versioned schema of this representation of an object.

kind.description: Kind is a string value representing the REST resource this object represents.

name.description: Name must match the cluster name used in ROSAControlPlane and Cluster.

namespace.description: Namespace must match the namespace used in ROSAControlPlane and Cluster.

spec.description: ROSAClusterSpec defines the desired state of ROSACluster. Configuration is managed via the associated ROSAControlPlane resource.

controlPlaneEndpoint.description: ControlPlaneEndpoint represents the endpoint used to communicate with the control plane. Populated automatically from the ROSAControlPlane.

host.description: The hostname on which the API server is serving.

port.description: The port on which the API server is serving.

status.description: ROSAClusterStatus defines the observed state of ROSACluster.

ready.description: Ready is true when the provider resource is ready.

failureDomains.description: FailureDomains is a list of failure domain objects synced from the infrastructure provider.
